main.summary: Invokes properties and methods on a configured instance or target type using reflection.

field.name: Sync
field.summary: Synchronization object for invoker state and member access.

field.name: TargetType
field.summary: Optional target type used when static members are enabled and no instance is set.

field.name: AllowStaticMembers
field.summary: True when static properties and methods are eligible for selection.

property.name: Type
property.summary: Current target type (instance type when available, otherwise configured static target type).

method.name: Create
method.summary: Create an invoker preconfigured with target instance.
method.returns: Invoker instance.

method.name: CreateType
method.summary: Create an invoker preconfigured with target type.
method.returns: Invoker instance.

method.name: CreateGeneric
method.summary: Create an invoker preconfigured with generic target type.
method.returns: Invoker instance.

method.name: SetInstance
method.summary: Set target instance.
method.returns: True when accepted; otherwise false.

method.name: SetType
method.summary: Set target type for static-member invocation.
method.returns: True when accepted; otherwise false.

method.name: SetAllowStaticMembers
method.summary: Enable or disable static member invocation.
method.returns: True when state update succeeds; otherwise false.

method.name: WithInstance
method.summary: Fluent pass-through to set target instance.
method.returns: Current invoker instance.

method.name: WithType
method.summary: Fluent pass-through to set target type.
method.returns: Current invoker instance.

method.name: WithTypeGeneric
method.summary: Fluent pass-through to set generic target type.
method.returns: Current invoker instance.

method.name: WithAllowStaticMembers
method.summary: Fluent pass-through to toggle static member invocation.
method.returns: Current invoker instance.

method.name: GetField
method.summary: Get public field value by exact name.
method.returns: Field value or null.
method.remarks: Prefers instance field over static field when both match and static members are enabled.

method.name: SetField
method.summary: Set public field value by exact name.
method.returns: True when field was set; otherwise false.
method.remarks: Prefers instance field over static field when both match and static members are enabled. Read-only and literal fields are not settable.

method.name: GetProperty
method.summary: Get public property value by exact name.
method.returns: Property value or null.
method.remarks: Prefers instance property over static property when both match and static members are enabled.

method.name: SetProperty
method.summary: Set public property value by exact name.
method.returns: True when property was set; otherwise false.
method.remarks: Prefers instance property over static property when both match and static members are enabled.

method.name: Invoke
method.summary: Invoke public method by exact name.
method.returns: Method return value or null.
method.remarks: Supports optional parameters, params-array expansion, and ref/out parameter binding. Prefers instance methods over static methods on tie when static members are enabled. Updated ref/out argument values are not accessible through this method; use InvokeDetailed for post-invocation argument state.

method.name: InvokeDetailed
method.summary: Invoke public method by exact name and return detailed invocation result including post-invocation argument state.
method.returns: Invocation result containing return value, post-invocation arguments with updated ref/out values, selected method, and by-ref parameter indices. Null on failure.
method.remarks: Supports optional parameters, params-array expansion, and ref/out parameter binding. The returned Arguments array is always a new array; the caller's input array is never mutated. Out parameters may be omitted from args and are auto-filled. Ref parameters require a supplied value.

method.name: InvokeAsync
method.summary: Invoke public method by exact name with async unwrapping support.
method.returns: Result value or null.
method.remarks: Unwraps Task, Task{T}, ValueTask, and ValueTask{T} return shapes. Supports ref/out parameter binding but updated argument values are not accessible; use InvokeDetailedAsync for post-invocation argument state.

method.name: InvokeDetailedAsync
method.summary: Invoke public method by exact name with async unwrapping support and return detailed invocation result.
method.returns: Invocation result containing return value, post-invocation arguments with updated ref/out values, selected method, and by-ref parameter indices. Null on failure.
method.remarks: Unwraps Task, Task{T}, ValueTask, and ValueTask{T} return shapes. The returned Arguments array is always a new array; the caller's input array is never mutated. Out parameters may be omitted from args and are auto-filled. Ref parameters require a supplied value.

method.name: InvokeStatic
method.summary: Invoke a public static method by exact name on the configured target type.
method.returns: Method return value or null.
method.remarks: Requires TargetType to be set and Instance to be null. Only static methods are considered; instance methods are excluded from selection. Supports optional parameters, params-array expansion, and ref/out parameter binding.

method.name: InvokeStaticAsync
method.summary: Invoke a public static method by exact name on the configured target type with async unwrapping support.
method.returns: Result value or null.
method.remarks: Requires TargetType to be set and Instance to be null. Only static methods are considered; instance methods are excluded from selection. Unwraps Task, Task{T}, ValueTask, and ValueTask{T} return shapes.

method.name: NormalizeAsyncResult
method.summary: Normalize async method result payloads to invoker return conventions.
method.returns: Normalized value; maps framework void-task markers to null.

method.name: GetTargetTypeNoSync
method.summary: Resolve effective invocation target type without acquiring synchronization.
method.returns: Instance type when instance exists; otherwise configured static target type when static access is enabled; else null.

method.name: TryFindField
method.summary: Find a matching public field by exact name and writability requirements.
method.returns: True when field selection succeeds; otherwise false.

method.name: TryFindProperty
method.summary: Find a matching public property by exact name and accessor requirements.
method.returns: True when property selection succeeds; otherwise false.

method.name: TrySelectMethod
method.summary: Select best matching public method for provided name and arguments.
method.returns: True when a non-ambiguous candidate is selected; otherwise false.

method.name: TrySelectStaticMethod
method.summary: Select best matching public static method for provided name and arguments. Instance methods are excluded from selection.
method.returns: True when a non-ambiguous static candidate is selected; otherwise false.

method.name: TryCreateInvokeArgs
method.summary: Create invoke argument list for method candidates, including params-array expansion.
method.returns: True when candidate can be invoked; otherwise false.

method.name: TryBindLeadingParameters
method.summary: Bind fixed parameters that precede a params-array tail.
method.returns: True when leading parameters bind successfully; otherwise false.

method.name: TryBindParamsTail
method.summary: Bind params-array tail from either explicit array input or packed trailing arguments.
method.returns: True when params tail binds successfully; otherwise false.

method.name: GetByRefIndices
method.summary: Collect parameter indices that are ref or out.
method.returns: Array of by-ref parameter indices. Empty when no by-ref parameters exist.
